Pang Ji йҫҗеӯЈ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Ji (йҫҗеӯЈ). Sent with Kuai Yue to persuade Zhang Hu and Chen Zuo to surrender. Pang Ji was affiliated with Liu Biao.
